Package renderer.algebra

Class ArrayBase

java.lang.Object
renderer.algebra.ArrayBase
Direct Known Subclasses:
Matrix, Vector
public abstract class ArrayBase extends Object
Abstract base class for array-based mathematical objects. Contains only operations that work on flat arrays without regard to structure.

  • Constructor Details

    • ArrayBase

      protected ArrayBase(String name, int size) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Constructor for subclasses.
      Parameters:
      name - the name
      size - the total number of elements
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if size is not positive

    • ArrayBase

      protected ArrayBase(int size) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Constructor for subclasses.
      Parameters:
      size - the total number of elements
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if size is not positive

  • Method Details

    • size

      public final int size()
      Gets the total number of elements.
      Returns:
      the number of elements

    • getDimensionString

      public String getDimensionString()
      Gets a string representation of the dimensions of this object. Subclasses should override to provide meaningful dimension info.
      Returns:
      a string describing the dimensions

    • fillRandom

      protected final void fillRandom()
      Fills the internal array with random values between 0.0 (inclusive) and 1.0 (exclusive). This is a pure array operation.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Gets the name.
      Returns:
      the name

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Sets the name.
      Parameters:
      name - the new name

    • getValues

      protected final double[] getValues()
      Gets the underlying values array.
      Returns:
      the values array

    • setValue

      protected final void setValue(int index, double value)
      Sets the value at a specific index. This is a pure array operation.
      Parameters:
      index - the index
      value - the value to set

    • getValue

      protected final double getValue(int index)
      Gets the value at a specific index. This is a pure array operation.
      Parameters:
      index - the index
      Returns:
      the value at the specified index

    • setAll

      protected final void setAll(double value)
      Sets all elements to a specific value. This is a pure array operation.
      Parameters:
      value - the value to set

    • copyValues

      protected final void copyValues(double[] source, int start, int length)
      Copies values from a source array into the internal storage. Copies from source[start] to source[start + length - 1] into values[0] to values[length - 1]. This is a pure array operation.
      Parameters:
      source - the source array
      start - the starting index in the source array
      length - the number of elements to copy
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if start or length are invalid or out of bounds

    • copyValues

      protected final void copyValues(double[] source)
      Copies values from a source array into the internal storage. This is a pure array operation.
      Parameters:
      source - the source array
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if source size doesn't match

    • scaleValues

      protected final void scaleValues(double factor, double[] dest)
      Scales all elements by a constant factor directly into a destination array. This is a pure array operation.
      Parameters:
      factor - the scaling factor
      dest - the destination array
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if destination size doesn't match

    • addValues

      protected final void addValues(double[] other, double[] dest)
      Element-wise addition of two arrays directly into a destination array. This is a pure array operation.
      Parameters:
      other - the other array
      dest - the destination array
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if sizes don't match

    • subtractValues

      protected final void subtractValues(double[] other, double[] dest)
      Element-wise subtraction of two arrays directly into a destination array. This is a pure array operation.
      Parameters:
      other - the other array
      dest - the destination array
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if sizes don't match

    • multiplyValues

      protected final void multiplyValues(double[] other, double[] dest)
      Element-wise multiplication of two arrays directly into a destination array. This is a pure array operation.
      Parameters:
      other - the other array
      dest - the destination array
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if sizes don't match

    • sumValues

      protected final double sumValues()
      Computes the sum of all elements. This is a pure array operation.
      Returns:
      the sum of all elements
